ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark test (e.g., metadata read, metadata write) */,
  "test_file" TEXT /* File used for the benchmark test */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language used for the benchmark test (e.g., JACE) */,
  "system_time" INTEGER /* System time taken for the test */,
  "thread_time" INTEGER /* Thread time taken for the test */,
  "proc_real" INTEGER /* Real time taken for the test */,
  "proc_user" INTEGER /* User time taken for the test */,
  "proc_system" INTEGER /* System time taken for the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benchmark test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_lang FOREIGN KEY ("lang") REFERENCES languages ("lang_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_test_file FOREIGN KEY ("test_file") REFERENCES test_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "lang_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "lang_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the test file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the test file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system resource */,
  "system_time" INTEGER /* System time taken for the test */,
  "thread_time" INTEGER /* Thread time taken for the test */,
  "proc_real" INTEGER /* Real time taken for the test */,
  "proc_user" INTEGER /* User time taken for the test */,
  "proc_system" INTEGER /* System time taken for the test */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the system resource */,
  "resource_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the system resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget */,
  "widget_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking test */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES benchmark_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking test */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the test result */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the test result was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES benchmark_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking test */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES benchmark_tests ("test_id")
)
